DECLARATION OF FRANK M. LA FLEUR IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO?S REPLY TO DEMURRER (TRANSACTION ID # 70047052) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE A TIMELY COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF WAITED FOR MORE THAN 2 YEARS AFTER THE CLAIM WAS REJECTED TO FILE THE COMPLAINT. THE GOVERNMENTAL CLAIM WAS FILED JUNE 2018, AND IT WAS REJECTED JULY 2018. PLAINTIFF HAD SIX MONTHS TO FILE, GOVT C. SEC. 945.6. BUT THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED JULY 2020. NO AMENDMENT CAN CURE THE FAILURE. A PROPOSED ORDER IS EMAILED FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT [WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND]

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY APRIL 24. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP Sections 583.210 and 583.250 as to defendant(s) GOR D. SARGSYAN only. The case is set for a case management conference on October 4, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to file a timely complaint. Plaintiff waited for more than 2 years after the claim was rejected to file the complaint. The governmental claim was filed June 2018, and it was rejected July 2018. Plaintiff had six months to file, Govt C. sec. 945.6. But the complaint was filed July 2020. No amendment can cure the failure.

A proposed order is emailed for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

City and County of San Francisco's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by April 24.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
